goal: Phase 2 source/catalog snapshot model for Orun (component catalog)

notes: Phase 2 Milestone C4 PR-2 ✅ shipped via PR #174 (squash 73c6e8e) on 2026-05-31. Tasks 0032 (implementer) + 0033 (verifier with attached coverage fix). Writer surface complete: refs.go (D.1–D.6 ordering, branch sanitisation, 16-retry CAS w/ ErrRefStale), indexes.go (C.1/C.2 plain Write, C.3 deterministic ascending CAS w/ mergeComponentGlobalIndex policy: identity-fields + Latest/Main freshness + Previews union+sort), events.go (AppendComponentEvent w/ seq.lock allocator, 16-retry, immutable event bodies via CreateIfAbsent). errors.go gained ErrRefStale (multi-target errors.Is chain via fmt.Errorf %w: %w pattern wrapping statestore.ErrConflict). Coverage path: implementer landed at 85.3% (HARD FAIL vs 90% floor); verifier path-(a) attached 28 focused tests across writer_test.go (extended spyStore w/ readErr/casErr/createNStdE/writeErr one-shot injection maps) and new verifier_coverage_test.go, lifting to 90.1% (484/537 statements, +4.8pp). Cleared floor; PASS-with-note. Adjacent floors held byte-for-byte. Spec drift to retry budget 8→16 noted but not escalated to spec proposal (advisory wording, single-writer Phase 2 is harmless; revisit at C9 / Phase 3).

Phase 2 Milestone C4 PR-1 ✅ shipped via PR #173 (squash c2d7b9d) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogstore greenfielded with paths.go, errors.go, writer.go (Steps A/B), store.go (interfaces + ErrNotImplemented stubs). Body writes use catalogmodel.PrettyEncode. Coverage on main: catalogstore 90.7%; Phase 1 floors held byte-for-byte (statestore 95.7, revision 90.3, executionstate 90.0); Phase 2 floors held (catalogmodel 91.1, sourcectx 91.1, catalogresolve 90.9). Verifier report: ai/reports/task-0031-verifier.md.

Five CatalogGraph siblings, T-IDK-1 1000-ordering deterministic-hash test green. catalogresolve coverage 90.9% on main.

Phase 2 Milestone C2 ✅ CLOSED via PR #170 (Task 0025) + PR #171 (Task 0026, squash 74b88e0) on 2026-05-31. Top-level Resolve(ctx, opts) covers stages 4-10 (infer/validate/assemble/deps/manifestHash). Errors-typed surface (ErrDuplicateComponent, ErrDependencyMissing, ErrCycle, ErrInferenceFailed). T-RES-1 + T-RES-2 + manifestHash provenance-exclusion property all proven.

Phase 2 Milestone C0/C1 ✅ shipped 2026-05-31. C0 PR #168 (catalogmodel/sourcectx skeleton, JSON Schema gen, T-IDK-1/3/5 property tests). C1 PR #169 (sourcectx resolver online, ResolveSourceSnapshot via injected Git/Clock/Filesystem adapters). Verifier-attached fix: TestCanonicalEncodeStringEscapeBranches deterministically pinned catalogmodel coverage floor.

C5+ roadmap (next): C5 = catalog CLI (orun catalog * subcommands per cli-surface.md, suggested 2 PRs: refresh+list+describe+refs / tree+history+validate, with diff stubbed for C8). C6 = orun plan integration. C7 = orun run integration + history events. C8 = catalogdiff/validate/rebuild. C9 = catalogsync seam (Syncer interface + NoopSyncer ONLY — no HTTP, no auth, no DB schema).
Phase 2 is local-only. No HTTP, no SaaS, no DB schema. internal/catalogsync ships only the Syncer interface and a NoopSyncer.
Phase 1 invariants preserved: do not rename Phase 1 fields, do not lower coverage floors, do not remove preserved CLI workflows.

Carry-forward (deferred from Phase 1, candidates for follow-on within Phase 2 scope): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, Option B trigger-name resolver branch (ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md), --prune-legacy.
